commands.review_summary:
Snapshots Codex dynamic tool descriptor fields before wrapping or spec emission, quarantines unreadable entries/descriptors, and adds focused regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +140, Tests +154. Total +294 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible: current main directly reads tool.name and tool.parameters during projection, so a throwing getter can abort bridge construction before Codex startup. I did not execute the regression test in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No ClawSweeper repair lane is needed because the review found no narrow actionable defect; the remaining work is normal draft and gate completion.

target.title: fix(codex): quarantine unreadable dynamic tools
target.body:
## Summary
- Snapshot Codex dynamic tool names, descriptions, and schemas before wrapping or emitting specs.
- Quarantine unreadable dynamic tool entries/descriptors instead of aborting Codex bridge construction.
- Keep healthy sibling dynamic tools available when one plugin tool has a hostile descriptor or list entry.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tools.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tools.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tools.test.ts`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxlint extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tools.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tools.test.ts`
- `git diff --check`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local --no-web-search`
- Remote changed gate: pending

## Real behavior proof
Behavior addressed: Codex app-server dynamic tool bridge no longer crashes before content when a dynamic tool list entry or descriptor field is unreadable.
Real environment tested: local macOS checkout with Node 24 via repo Vitest wrapper; AWS Crabbox pending.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs extensions/codex/src/app-server/dynamic-tools.test.ts -- --reporter=dot`
Evidence after fix: focused Codex dynamic-tools suite passed 38 tests, including unreadable entry and unreadable descriptor regressions.
Observed result after fix: malformed dynamic tools are quarantined, warnings/diagnostics name the offending tool or index, healthy sibling specs remain available, and healthy tool calls still execute.
What was not tested: full repository test suite; remote changed gate pending.
